{
  EmployeeColumnAttributes.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeColumnAttributesRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register()
    {
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Address), "Street", new(Heading: "Street Address", Width: 30));
    }
},
  EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> NameColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

    public static void NameHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Name);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> StreetColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Address.Street, configuration);

    public static void StreetHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Address.Street);

    public static void StreetRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Address.Street);

    public static void StreetInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Address.Street);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> CityColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Address.City, configuration);

    public static void CityHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Address.City);

    public static void CityRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Address.City);

    public static void CityInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Address.City);
}
